notes: v0.16.41 — PLAY hub rebuilt as bento-grid mosaic. PRACTICE + BOSS RUSH dominate as 2×2 / 2×1 tiles with animated procedural scenes (SHARD ship aiming at target + boss rings with ship orbiting). COMING SOON modes fill side cells dim with diagonal LOCKED straps. Arcade Neon styling throughout. BOSS RUSH internals rebuilt as List + Detail: left column boss roster with mini animated thumbnails, right column full detail card with hero animation + name + description + difficulty + rewards + leaderboard + new TACTICS panel showing VERSE / BUILD-UP / DROP plans per boss. Tactics + descriptions added for all 4 bosses (CIRCLE / PRISM / HIVE / SNAKE). WHAT'S NEXT roadmap removed from HOME. Plus earlier topbar Twin Panels currency split, ship-anim fix, PEAK/DAY removal. Windows only.
